texto: If everyone followed through on their resolutions, the conseqences for humanity would be dire: The fast food industry would collapse, the gyms would become unbearably crowded, and lifestyle magazines would have nothing left to say.
explicacao: Citação de Amanda Foreman sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “If everyone followed through on their resolutions, the conseqences for humanity would be dire: Th…” articula humor, food-for-thought, would em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como academia e humor.
